UI_modselector_collection_add_prompt: Enter Steam Workshop collection URL or ID:
UI_modselector_collection_addTooltip: Add a Steam Workshop collection by URL or ID (also subscribes to every item in it)
UI_modselector_collection_removeTooltip: Remove the selected collection from the list
UI_modselector_collection_refreshTooltip: Re-fetch title and children for the selected collection
UI_modselector_enableAllTooltip: Enable every mod currently visible in the list
UI_modselector_disableAllTooltip: Disable every mod currently visible in the list
